title: convolvulus crinicalyx
intro: Convolvulus crinicalyx, also known as the 'twining bindweed' or 'creeping jenny', is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus crinicalyx include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
